codeReview.summary: The original recharacterization commit was test-only, but the existing review report is no longer accurate against current HEAD. Current tests and implementation now show `/coins/{id}/history` returns populated `market_data` and `/coins/{id}/market_chart` returns multi-point seeded series, so the prior review incorrectly passes expectations that no longer match the repository state.

issues.description: The existing review summary claims coin history now expects `market_data` to be null, but current HEAD asserts and implements non-null `market_data.current_price.usd` for `/coins/bitcoin/history` (`tests/app.test.ts:6083-6089`, `src/modules/coins/detail.ts:64-94`). The report is stale and inaccurate.

The existing review summary claims the chart response is an explicit single-point payload with null market cap, but current HEAD verifies a multi-point seeded series containing historical `market_caps` and `total_volumes` (`tests/app.test.ts:6092-6132`). The report no longer reflects the reviewed feature outcome against current HEAD.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill says audit/report features should produce structured reports and list every endpoint covered in the handoff, but the existing worker evidence for this feature was not available from mission `features.json`/handoffs under the assigned feature id, which made current-head scrutiny rely on the existing report plus commit evidence instead of a feature-specific handoff trail.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No `compatibility-app-suite-recharacterization` entry was found in `/home/whoami/.factory/missions/f3507a1f-9e14-4c7c-a7d4-636d4909f2b3/features.json`, and no matching handoff file existed under the mission handoffs directory; the only direct evidence was the existing review file and commit `36b18fed...`.

summary: Updated the scrutiny report to fail because the prior review JSON was stale: current HEAD no longer matches the old claim that coin history returns null `market_data` and single-point chart payloads. Evidence came from commit `36b18fed...`, current `tests/app.test.ts`, and current coin detail implementation.
